title: Disha Publication Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Disha Publication Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Disha Publication Asia Pacific Associates family as a Subject Matter Expert in Indore. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Disha Publication Asia Pacific Associates:
Disha Publication Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Disha Publication Asia Pacific Associates!
